title: MikroTik RouterBOARD L009UiGS-2HaxD-IN
description: The successor to the legendary RB2011 product line is here! The L009UiGS-2HaxD-IN is the perfect small WiFi router with low acquisition cost, WiFi 6 requirement, high performance and passive cooling . The device is equipped with a powerful dual-core IPQ-5018 processor with a clock speed of 800 MHz, 512 MB RAM, 128 MB storage, 8x Gigabit LAN with support for PoE-IN (24 - 56V passive or 802.af) on the first and PoE-Out (passive only) on the last port, a full USB 3.0 port (for example to connect… The wireless Gen6 AX chip allows you to squeeze the traditional 2.4 GHz wireless spectrum like a lemon! Depending on your overall setup, you can expect a speed increase of up to 90%! (8) Gigabit Ethernet (1) SFP port with speed up to 2.5 Gbps 800 MHz CPU - 2 cores, ARM 64bit architecture 4x more powerful compared to RB2011 2 types of power supply - DC jack, PoE (24 to 56 V DC or 802.3af) 128MB NAND, 512MB RAM Wi-Fi - only 2.4 GHz (2Ã2 MIMO, 574 Mbps , 802.11ax) The 802.11ax standard increases the speed by up to 90% in the 2.4 GHz band RouterOS level 5, version 7 Passive cooling without fans Possibility of installation in a 19" rack - when purchasing the K-79 rackmount kit Device (2) removable WiFi antenna Power adapter 24 V/1.5 A
